top_signals.title: Minutes of the London FXJSC Main Committee Meeting – 26 March 2026
top_signals.summary: The Bank of England chairs the London Foreign Exchange Joint Standing Committee (FXJSC), which is a forum for discussion of the wholesale foreign exchange market. The FXJSC is made up of market participants, infrastructure providers and the UK financial regulators.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Minutes of the London FXJSC Legal Sub Committee Meeting – 17 March 2026
top_signals.summary: The Bank of England chairs the London Foreign Exchange Joint Standing Committee (FXJSC) Legal Sub-Committee. The FXJSC is made up of market participants, infrastructure providers and the UK financial regulators.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Minutes of the London FXJSC Operations Sub-Committee Meeting – 18 March 2026
top_signals.summary: The Bank of England chairs the London Foreign Exchange Joint Standing Committee (FXJSC) Operations and Legal Sub-Committees. The FXJSC is made up of market participants, infrastructure providers and the UK financial regulators.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Noteholders to Aston Martin Sign Cooperation Pact Amid Debt Rout
top_signals.summary: A group of creditors to luxury car maker Aston Martin has signed a cooperation pact as earnings pressure weighs on the company’s debt.

top_signals.title: Qatari LNG Tanker Remains Stranded After Projectile Strike
top_signals.summary: A Qatari LNG tanker remained stranded off Oman on Wednesday after a projectile strike sparked a fire in its engine room, though industry sources said the vessel's cargo appeared secure and the risk of an explosion was low for now.The attacks…
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
